calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAVID ZALOB, ESQ., 415.788.2465, FOR DEFENDANT LORRAINE LIM; No other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS Denied, in part. The court orders wage garnishment of $40.00 per pay period against Ms. Lim. SEE WRITTEN ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
